'''Rojarra''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] who was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Kaox Krul]] during the [[New Sith Wars]].<ref name="The Pengalan Tradeoff" />
